title: RangeSlider
description: Dual-thumb slider for selecting a numeric range. Supports marks, value formatting and the usual visual modes.

basic.title: Basic usage
basic.desc: Range selection with two thumbs and v-model as a tuple.
basic.label: Range

marks.title: With marks
marks.desc: Marks at regular intervals to guide selection.
marks.label: Age

formatted.title: Formatted values
formatted.desc: formatValue lets you display units, prefixes or any custom format.
formatted.label: Price

colors.title: Colors
colors.desc: Semantic variants aligned with the rest of the system.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.desc: Disabled state preserving the visible values.
disabled.label: Disabled

props.modelValue: Tuple [from, to] with the range values (v-model).
props.minDistance: Minimum distance between the two thumbs.
props.showValue: Displays the current range next to the label.
props.formatValue: Function to format the displayed values.
props.label: Visible label above the control.
props.color: Semantic color of the filled segment and thumbs.
props.readonly: Locks changes while keeping values visible.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when the range changes (syncs v-model).
emits.change: Emitted when a drag or keyboard interaction ends.

types.title: RangeSlider
types.desc: TypeScript interface for the RangeSlider component props. Extends Slider with dual-thumb range selection and minimum distance constraint.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus between the two thumbs
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.kbArrow: Increment or decrement the focused thumb by one step
a11y.kbHome: Jump the focused thumb to the minimum value
a11y.kbEnd: Jump the focused thumb to the maximum value
a11y.ariaValueNow: Each thumb announces its current numeric value
a11y.ariaInvalid: Set to true when errorText is present
a11y.ariaDescribedBy: Links helper or error text to the slider for screen reader context
a11y.ariaDisabled: Communicates disabled state to assistive technologies
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name when no visible label is present
a11y.focusThumbs: Both thumbs are independently focusable and keyboard-operable
